title: Disney Simba Official MICKEY MOUSE REFRESH CORE MINNIE, Pink, white, 25CM
features: Authentic character likeness; embroidered eyes, big ears, squishy feet
Dressed in signature Minnie Mouse attire – pink polka dot dress with matching bow, white gloves, and pink heeled shoes
description: Product Description Disney’s Minnie Mouse Cuddly Toy Take home your very own adorable Minnie Mouse cuddly toy from Disney. Minnie is the long-time sweetheart of Mickie Mouse; her friendly and cheerful personality makes Minnie one of the most loved characters worldwide. Standing at 25cm tall, Minnie Mouse is brought back to life in a super soft plushie ready to accompany you or your little one on whatever adventures the day throws your way. Everyone’s Favourite Friend Your favourite characters from Disney have been brought to life in cuddly plush toys. Choose from Minnie or Mickie Mouse, or take them both home for double the fun! Your little one will adore Minnie’s soft fur, squishy feet, big ears, and cute face. She’s dressed in her signature bright pink polka dot dress with a matching bow, white gloves and pink shoes for an authentic Minnie character plushie, guaranteed to delight Disney fans young and old. A True Disney Collectable Our 25cm Minnie Mouse plushie makes a wonderful addition to any Disney toy collection. With her unique characteristics, cute features, and extra-soft fur, she is sure to stand out in your plushie collection and be a true favourite with Disney fans all over the world. Your little one will adore their new cuddly friend and can create magical stories of their own every day. Child-Friendly Mickie Mouse Plush Toys Each Disney Minnie Mouse Plush is created with super soft materials and made to the highest quality. Minnie is suitable for children and adults, safe from 0 months. Newborn, teen or parent, your favourite, lovable characters from the Disney universe are recreated in special cuddly toys, authentically licenced from Disney, and are the perfect gift for Disney enthusiasts everywhere. Safety Warning TOY INSIDE - For use under adult supervision
